releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix/escape key by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Canvas-MindMap/pull/4

Now you can press escape to escape editing status and then press `enter` and `tab` to continue your mindmap rather than click on any node again.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Canvas-MindMap/compare/0.0.2...0.0.3
